svg.title: Layout pipeline from MultiSpan to colored carets
svg.desc: A MultiSpan's primary and context spans are resolved through the SourceMap, marshalled into annotate_snippets::Snippet values that carry an Origin and a list of Annotations tagged Primary or Context, wrapped in a Group keyed by Level, and handed to Renderer::render which emits the colored caret-underlined output (or to the JSON emitter for --error-format=json).
